title: notholaena lutea
intro: Notholaena lutea, also known as the golden fern, is a species of fern native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Notholaena lutea include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and protect against infection. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into salves, ointments, or teas, and can be applied topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
